Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $58,697,076Details
International Box Office $101,249,413
Worldwide Box Office $159,946,489
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,396,167
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,237,502
Total $15,633,669
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Years after resigning command of an elite military police unit, the nomadic, righter-of-wrongs Reacher is drawn back into the life he left behind when his friend and successor, Major Susan Turner is framed for espionage. Reacher will stop at nothing to prove her innocence and to expose the real perpetrators behind the killings of his former soldiers.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,872,490 (39.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,780 opening theaters/3,780 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $81,150,633

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2016 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
October 21st, 2016 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: October 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Poland)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide), released as JACK REACHER: NIKOLI SE NE VRNI (Slovenia)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide), released as Džekas Ryčeris: nesidairyk atgal (Lithuania)
Video Release: January 17th, 2017 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, some bloody images, language and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2445 (Cert #50562), 10/5/2016)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Jack Reacher
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Conspiracy Theory, Falsely Accused, Government Corruption, Prison Break
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Skydance Productions, Tom Cruise Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Years after resigning command of an elite military police unit, the nomadic, righter-of-wrongs Reacher is drawn back into the life he left behind when his friend and successor, Major Susan Turner is framed for espionage. Reacher will stop at nothing to prove her innocence and to expose the real perpetrators behind the killings of his former soldiers.
